content:
## 1. Summary
Capacitor-bank-C-7 produced 5 same-lot defects (3 high, 2 medium) in 4 hours, all traceable to lot 2026-0430-B and consistent with a dielectric degradation mode that should escalate the existing alert.

## 2. Findings
- Lot 2026-0430-B shows a coherent failure signature: DAR collapsed to 0.39 (spec >0.7) on three units, with ESR ~58% above baseline on two more. This is not random; it points to dielectric impregnation or moisture contamination upstream, not a line-assembly defect.
- All five capacitor defects landed on bank C-7, reinforcing the existing 60-day alert (now effectively 15/17 night-shift defects). The shift-C correlation is no longer borderline.
- Three high-severity defects in one shift moves defect_rate_per_shift firmly past WARN; critical_count_24h is still OK only because none of the units shipped or energized to rated voltage.
- VP-4 squeal is a known repeat (second this week) and unrelated to the capacitor cluster, but it is trending toward a bearing or seal issue and should not be lost in the noise.

## 3. Recommended actions
- Quarantine all of lot 2026-0430-B immediately, pull retains, and run DAR + ESR + insulation-resistance on a 10-unit sample before any further units from this lot enter test. Notify the impregnation/curing process owner before day shift starts.
- Take capacitor-bank-C-7 test station out of service for a calibration check and probe-contact inspection before ruling it purely a lot issue — the shift-C concentration is suspicious enough to warrant excluding instrumentation drift.
- Open a low-priority work order on VP-4 for bearing/seal inspection at next PM window; do not wait for a third occurrence.

## 4. Updated hot state proposal
```json
{
  "current_shift_summary": "Shift C 2026-04-30: 3 high + 2 medium defects on capacitor-bank-C-7, all from lot 2026-0430-B (DAR 0.39, ESR ~19 mOhm); 1 low VP-4 vent squeal (repeat). Lot quarantine recommended.",
  "active_alerts": [
    "capacitor-bank-C-7 elevated night-shift defect rate (15/17 in past 60 days) — escalate to HIGH",
    "lot 2026-0430-B suspected dielectric/impregnation defect — quarantine pending sample retest",
    "vacuum-pump-VP-4 recurring vent-cycle squeal (2x this week) — PM inspection"
  ],
  "threshold_statuses": {
    "defect_rate_per_shift": "ALARM",
    "critical_count_24h": "OK",
    "lot_defect_concentration": "ALARM"
  }
}
```
